steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: To contrast the two NWRs is to highlight a difference between them. The answer must mention both refuges and show how they differ — not combine them under a similarity or focus on only one.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'While the James River NWR is in Virginia, on the Atlantic coast, the Hopper Mountain NWR is in California, on the Pacific coast.': Uses While to set up a direct parallel contrast — different states and different coasts — for both refuges. This is a genuine contrast. ✓
  • Choice B — 'The US has designated more than 500 areas NWRs, including the James River NWR in Virginia.': Mentions only one refuge and provides background context, not a contrast between the two. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Both the James River NWR and the Hopper Mountain NWR were established to protect endangered species.': Describes a similarity (both protect endangered species), not a contrast. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Some NWRs were established specifically to protect endangered species such as the California condor.': Mentions only one specific animal and one refuge implicitly; no contrast between the two NWRs. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
